---
title: "My Git Workflow Guide"
author: "Your Name"
format: html
---

## Introduction

This document is version-controlled with Git.

```{r}
x <- 1:10
mean(x)
```

## Summary Statistics

<<<<<<< HEAD
This version was written on main and will conflict with testbranch.
=======
This section was added on testbranch.

```{r}
## Summary Statistics
summary(cars)
```
>>>>>>> testbranch
